description: Bifolio of fiscal accounting, with entries for months of the years 524, 525, and 526 AH. Very detailed, fairly well preserved. The first entry (recto, lefthand page) names Bū Naṣr al-Sharābī (same as in T-S NS 225.87 (PGPID 24226)?). Most entries have registrations for the dīwān al-ishrāf (at upper right) and dīwān al-ʿamal (at upper left). Needs closer examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
